title: leontodon hyoseroides subsp. pseudocrispus
intro: Leontodon hyoseroides subsp. pseudocrispus, also known as the Autumn Hawkbit, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leontodon hyoseroides subsp. pseudocrispus include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
